title: Parent and linked requirement IDs are not validated on write
context: When setting --parent on a requirement or --link on a decision, the referenced ID may not exist in the store. The tool could reject unknown IDs or silently accept them.
decision: Accept any string as a parent or linked requirement ID without checking existence.
rationale: Permissive references allow forward-referencing (creating a child before its parent), bulk imports, and cross-prefix references. Dangling references are visible on list/tree/export and can be resolved by the user. Strict validation would require a full scan on every write and would break legitimate workflows.
